name: Spaghini Stick to Your Ribs Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground round in a large Dutch oven over medium heat until browned.
2. Drain the meat and add water and the next ingredients (water through broth) to the pot.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Break pasta in half and stir into the soup; cook an additional 5 minutes or until the pasta is done.
